ddls:
CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "actor_facebook_likes" INTEGER /* Number of Facebook likes for the actor */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Actor's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Actor's nationality */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Actor's gender */,
  "height" REAL /* Actor's height in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Actor's weight in kilograms */,
  "representative" TEXT /* Name of the actor's representative or agent */,
  "filmography" TEXT /* List of films the actor has appeared in */,
  "awards_won" TEXT /* List of awards won by the actor */,
  "awards_nominated" TEXT /* List of awards the actor was nominated for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "director_facebook_likes" INTEGER /* Number of Facebook likes for the director */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Director's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Director's nationality */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Director's gender */,
  "representative" TEXT /* Name of the director's representative or agent */,
  "filmography" TEXT /* List of films the director has directed */,
  "awards_won" TEXT /* List of awards won by the director */,
  "awards_nominated" TEXT /* List of awards the director was nominated for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)
column_names: Number of Facebook likes for the actor
Name of the actor's representative or agent
List of films the actor has appeared in
List of awards won by the actor
List of awards the actor was nominated for
Number of Facebook likes for the director
Name of the director's representative or agent
List of films the director has directed
List of awards won by the director
List of awards the director was nominated for
